summary: Comprehensive testing of unified Members + Users management feature. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly - members show role badges and login names, App-Zugang toggle works, /users redirects to /members, Settings shows Benutzerrollen section.

issues: Hydration warnings about <span> inside <option>/<select> elements - cosmetic issue from fiscal year selector, no functional impact (same as iteration_6)

seed_data_creation: Test members created and cleaned up automatically via pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Members + Users management fully tested. Key tests: 1) GET /api/members returns user_info field (null or {user_id, username, role}), 2) POST /api/members/{id}/access creates user for member, 3) POST /api/members/{id}/access rejects duplicate usernames, weak passwords (<8 chars or no number), and admin role, 4) DELETE /api/members/{id}/access removes user, 5) PUT /api/members/{id}/access updates username/role/password, 6) Frontend Members page shows role badges (Spieß/Vorstand/Mitglied) and 'Login: username' for members with access, 7) Edit dialog has App-Zugang toggle with username/password/role fields, 8) /users route redirects to /members, 9) Settings page has Benutzerrollen section with role descriptions.

backend: GET /api/members returns members with user_info field - PASSED
POST /api/members/{id}/access creates user for member - PASSED
POST /api/members/{id}/access rejects weak password (no number) - PASSED
DELETE /api/members/{id}/access returns 404 if no access - PASSED
PUT /api/members/{id}/access returns 404 if no access - PASSED
GET /api/users still works for admin - PASSED
frontend: Sidebar: Mitgliederverwaltung nav item exists - PASSED
Sidebar: Benutzerverwaltung nav item does NOT exist (removed) - PASSED
Sidebar: Administration group has Strafenarten, Audit-Log, Einstellungen - PASSED
Members page: Shows members with role badges (Vorstand, Mitglied) - PASSED
Members page: Shows 'Login: username' for members with access - PASSED
Add Member dialog: App-Zugang toggle exists - PASSED
Add Member dialog: Username/password/role fields appear when toggle enabled - PASSED
Create member with app access: Creates both member and user - PASSED
Disable app access: Removes user and login label - PASSED
Settings page: Benutzerrollen section exists - PASSED
Settings page: All role descriptions (Admin, Spieß, Vorstand, Mitglied) shown - PASSED

notes.password_policy: Minimum 8 characters, at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number
notes.admin_role_restriction: Admin role cannot be assigned via member access endpoints - admin is a system account
notes.user_info_field: GET /api/members enriches each member with user_info: {user_id, username, role} or null
notes.sidebar_changes: Benutzerverwaltung removed from sidebar, only Mitgliederverwaltung under Administration
